dashboardHardChecks.rule: Dashboard pages must set the page content area to full width with zero content-area padding, then place all visual content under Main > Content.
Layout Grid controls must disable display label/caption so runtime pages do not show visible Grid rows.
Every dashboard control must have a meaningful Navigator label rather than defaults such as Container, Grid, Text, Button, Summary, Dynamic field, Kanban, or Collection.
KPI card numbers must come from hidden Summary controls saved to dashboard temp variables and visible formatted Text controls, following the Service Desk Pro Executive Dashboard reference.
Dashboard buttons must use the export-proven button format, meaningful labels, and valid action or navigation bindings.
Dashboard Dynamic controls must only be placed inside row-context item templates such as Kanban, Collection, or Timeline templates.
